notation.units: pattern is a flat array of mora units: 1 = short (S), 2 = long (L)
notation.anceps: the final unit is free (S or L) at line end; the matcher ignores a final-position mismatch
notation.overlong: an over-long syllable (e.g. saath, dard) contributes 2 then 1 to the line pattern
notation.confidence: from-app = copied verbatim from the existing app; standard = textbook arkan derivation; verify = common but please confirm against your own corpus before trusting

_howToExtend: Add a row with id, name, arkan (human note), pattern (array of 1/2). The matcher reads `pattern` only; everything else is documentation. To add a zihaf variant, add it as its own row with its own full pattern — the matcher finds the closest, so you do not need a zihaf engine.

behrs.name: Mutaqarib Murabbe (app v1)
behrs.notes: Original app entry. Matras 16. Equivalent to Mutaqarib musamman saalim.

behrs.name: Ramal Musamman Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: faa'ilaatun x3 + faa'ilun  (L S L L)x3 (L S L)

behrs.name: Ramal Musaddas Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: faa'ilaatun x2 + faa'ilun  (L S L L)x2 (L S L)

behrs.name: Hazaj Musaddas Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: mafaa'iilun x2 + fa'uulun  (S L L L)x2 (S L L)

behrs.name: Mutaqarib Musamman Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: fa'uulun x3 + fa'uul  (S L L)x3 (S L)

behrs.name: Kaamil Musamman Saalim
behrs.arkan: mutafaa'ilun x4  (S S L S L)x4

behrs.name: Mujtas Musamman Makhbun Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: mafaa'ilun fa'ilaatun mafaa'ilun fa'ilun  (S L S L)(S S L L)(S L S L)(S S L)
behrs.notes: Extremely common in modern ghazal (much of Faiz). Matras 22. Confirm the makhbun foot weights against your corpus.

behrs.name: Khafeef Musaddas Makhbun Mahzuf
behrs.arkan: faa'ilaatun mafaa'ilun fa'ilun  (L S L L)(S L S L)(S S L)
behrs.notes: Common ghazal meter. Matras 17. Multiple legal variants exist; add rows as needed.

behrs.name: Muzaari' Musamman Akhrab
behrs.arkan: maf'uulu faa'ilaatun maf'uulu faa'ilaatun  (L L S)(L S L L)(L L S)(L S L L)
